data.name: Haven For Emma
data.detailed_description:
在 “Haven Fore Emma ”中，您将沉浸在一个充满戏剧性和人际关系的故事中。你将扮演一名年轻人，面对来自同事艾玛的意外邀约。艾玛被解雇后无力支付房租，她向你求助，并提供了一些不同寻常的东西来回报你的款待。你可以对她为所欲为。你可以一天 24 小时和这个女孩做爱，或者只是作为一个忠诚的朋友和她生活在一起。但这位性感女郎会给你带来什么样的挑战呢？你将在这款游戏中找到答案！

本游戏面向成人观众，包含的主题可能不适合所有年龄段或在工作场所观看。

深刻的故事：探索复杂的道德困境，并做出会给两个角色带来严重后果的决定。
互动交流：与艾玛互动，加深对她的性格和你们之间关系的了解。
动态角色发展：根据您的行动和决定，观察艾玛的行为和情绪变化。
逼真的画面和氛围：享受极具视觉吸引力的画面和氛围，让您沉浸在游戏世界中。

data.short_description: 艾玛的避风港》（Haven For Emma）是一款第一人称游戏。你将扮演一个年轻人，他的女友艾玛向他提出了一个不同寻常的提议。艾玛将住在你的房子里，你可以对她为所欲为！上不上她由你决定.....。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 匈牙利文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.0 Ghz (2 Core)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 260 / Radeon HD 4850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 (only 64-bit) or Windows 10 (only 64-bit)
  • 處理器: 3.33 Ghz (4 Core)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVidia GeForce GTX 670 / AMD Radeon HD 7990
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間

data.name: Haven For Emma
data.detailed_description:
In “Haven Fore Emma” you are immersed in a story full of drama and human relationships. You play as a young man who is faced with an unexpected offer from his coworker, Emma. After being fired and unable to pay the rent, Emma comes to you for help and offers you something unusual in return for your hospitality. You can do whatever you want with her. You can fuck this girl 24 hours a day or just live with her as a loyal friend. But what kind of challenges this sexy girl has in store for you? This you will find out in this game!

The game is intended for an adult audience and contains themes that may not be suitable for all ages or for viewing at work.

Deep story: Explore complex moral dilemmas and make decisions that will have serious consequences for both characters.
Interactive Interaction: Interact with Emma to deepen your understanding of her character and your relationship.
Dynamic Character Development: Watch Emma's behavior and emotions change depending on your actions and decisions.
Realistic graphics and atmosphere: Enjoy visually appealing graphics and an atmosphere that immerses you in the world of the game.

data.short_description: Haven For Emma is a first-person game. You find yourself in the role of a young guy who has received an unusual offer from his girlfriend Emma. Emma will live in your house and you will do whatever you want with her! It's up to you whether you fuck her or not.....
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
